title: ThaSMP

body:
![Logo of ThaSMP](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d3590f10b17562a3057d1c34c6ba1edc09968e45.png)

# ThaSMP


THA SMP is a community-driven Minecraft survival multiplayer (SMP) server built around fun, creativity, and chaos. Our unique charm comes from our lighthearted approach—where **we put "THA" in front of everything** and embrace the randomness that makes every session unforgettable. Whether players are building epic structures, pulling off hilarious pranks, or embarking on wild adventures, THA SMP is a space where friendships grow and memories are made. The goal of this project is to create an inclusive, entertaining, and ever-evolving world where players can express themselves and enjoy the game in their own way.
